title: pinus tabuliformis subsp. henryi
intro: Pinus tabuliformis subsp. henryi, also known as Henry's pine or Chinese white pine, is a subspecies of evergreen coniferous tree native to China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pinus tabuliformis subsp. henryi include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. In herbal preparations, Pinus tabuliformis subsp. henryi is often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
